description: VCP v3.2 conformance fixtures for the VEP-0004 situational dimensions (positions 10-13): EMBODIMENT, PROXIMITY, RELATIONSHIP, FORMALITY. These vectors target the VCP-Extended conformance tier. Personal-state (R-line) field names are 'value' + 'intensity' (1-5). The band separator between situational and personal wire halves is U+2016 (‖ DOUBLE VERTICAL LINE). Situational dims are joined with '|'. RELATIONSHIP is free-form: its value is a compound '{tie}:{function}' string rather than an emoji from a fixed vocabulary.

vectors.description: EMBODIMENT alone (standing person + manipulating hand): VEP-0004 minimum, no core/personal

expected.note: EMBODIMENT symbol 🧍 (U+1F9CD) + manipulating hand ✋ (U+270B). One dim only → no pipe.

vectors.description: PROXIMITY alone (left-right arrow + pinching hand): VS16 symbol handling

expected.note: PROXIMITY symbol ↔️ is U+2194 + U+FE0F (VS16). Value 🤏 (U+1F90F) = intimate distance. Parsers MUST accept both the VS16-qualified and bare (U+2194 only) forms.

RELATIONSHIP 🪢 (U+1FAA2) carries free-form '{tie}:{function}' strings, NOT emoji. The internal colon is part of the value and MUST NOT be interpreted as an intensity separator (intensity is R-line only).
Any non-empty '{tie}:{function}' pair is valid; there is no closed vocabulary for RELATIONSHIP.

vectors.description: FORMALITY alone (top hat + briefcase): professional register
All four VEP-0004 dims in canonical position order (10, 11, 12, 13)

expected.note: VEP-0004 dims encode in strict position order. EMBODIMENT=10, PROXIMITY=11, RELATIONSHIP=12, FORMALITY=13.

vectors.description: Core situational + all VEP-0004 dims, no personal (Extended without R-line)

expected.note: Extended is triggered by ANY VEP-0004 dim regardless of personal presence. Here the ‖ band separator is absent because personal is empty.

vectors.description: Canonical VCP v3.2 18-dim example (spec §2 + §A.3): full Extended with R-line

expected.note: Canonical v3.2 worst-case fixture. 8 situational (4 core + 4 VEP-0004) joined by '|', then ‖ (U+2016 DOUBLE VERTICAL LINE) band separator, then 5 personal-state dims with intensity suffix. Matches the example in schemas/vcp-adaptation-context.schema.json.

vectors.description: RELATIONSHIP containing an emoji in the tie slot

expected.note: RELATIONSHIP values are arbitrary strings. Implementations MUST NOT validate against a closed vocabulary for the tie or function slot.

vectors.description: Single VEP-0004 dim (FORMALITY) with personal R-line: Extended (not Standard)

expected.note: Extended precedence rule: the presence of any VEP-0004 dim makes the context Extended, even if personal-state dims are also present (which would otherwise make it Standard). 🎓 (U+1F393) = academic register.

vectors.description: PROXIMITY parse compatibility: VS16-qualified vs bare

expected.note: Canonical encoder emits the VS16-qualified form ↔️ (U+2194 U+FE0F). Parsers MUST also accept the bare form (U+2194 only). 🌐 (U+1F310) = remote/global distance.
🛑 (U+1F6D1) on EMBODIMENT signals an emergency halt (see schema metadata.has_emergency). Implementations MAY elevate risk_level accordingly.
